zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna於1473年出生在英國瓦維其可爾斯圖頓時，她的父親Gholson F Popplewell18歲，母親Margaret Douglas Miller19歲。她於1494年與John Robyns II在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯圖頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna于1473年出生在英国瓦維其可爾斯圖頓时，她的父亲Gholson F Popplewell18岁，母亲Margaret Douglas Miller19岁。她于1494年与John Robyns II在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾斯圖頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年在英国瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna was born in 1473, in Stourton, Warwickshire, England, her father, Gholson F Popplewell, was 18 and her mother, Margaret Douglas Miller, was 19. She married John Robyns II in 1494, in Stourton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1560, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna est née en 1473, à Stourton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Gholson F Popplewell, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret Douglas Miller, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Robyns II en 1494, à Stourton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1560, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna 1473 in Stourton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gholson F Popplewell 18 und ihre Mutter Margaret Douglas Miller 19. Sie hat 1494 in Stourton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom John Robyns II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1560 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna è nata il nel 1473 nel Stourton, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Gholson F Popplewell, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Margaret Douglas Miller, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Robyns II nel 1494, nel Stourton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1560, nel Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johannaが1473年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父Gholson F Popplewellは18歳，母Margaret Douglas Millerは19歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストウルトンでJohn Robyns IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna(이)가 1473년 영국 워윅실르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gholson F Popplewell(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Douglas Miller(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스토우르턴에서 John Robyns II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna nasceu em 1473, em Stourton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gholson F Popplewell, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Douglas Miller, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Robyns II em 1494, em Stourton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1560, em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna родилась в 1473 г. в местности стоуртон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gholson F Popplewell было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Douglas Miller, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Robyns II в 1494 г. в местности стоуртон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1560 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna nació en 1473, en Stourton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gholson F Popplewell, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Margaret Douglas Miller, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Robyns II en 1494, en Stourton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1560, en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años.
